prompt: In this tournament preflop spot, choose the best action.
why_v1: Raise when fold equity is strong and stack risk is controlled.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the track cue set, so the line applies pressure only when the read gives you a real leverage edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise because fold equity is strong enough here to win the pot before a dangerous tournament call has to realize its equity.
